constraints: One-shot WAV cues for UE5 gameplay events.
Readable transient first, stylized heroic fantasy color second.
Keep event names stable so procedural UE5 fallbacks and production assets share one vocabulary.

sfx.prompt: Light Warrior dash shimmer SFX, quick holy air rush, bright crystal particles, agile heroic movement, no melody, game-ready one shot.
sfx.envelope: fast shimmer rise, short luminous tail

sfx.prompt: Light Warrior sword impact SFX, sacred light strike, metallic hit plus radiant spark burst, readable combat feedback, no voice.
Enemy shadow dissolve SFX, corrupted smoke collapses then burns away into warm light, satisfying defeat cue, no gore, no voice.
sfx.envelope: dark burst into upward purification fade

sfx.prompt: Sacred circle expansion SFX, restorative holy pulse, warm choir-like resonance without vocals, magical boundary growing outward.
sfx.envelope: soft pulse blooms into temple resonance

sfx.prompt: Thunder Hammer temple activation SFX, ancient stone machinery wakes, sacred chimes, blue lightning core charges, heroic reveal.
sfx.envelope: ancient chime stack, energy core lights up

sfx.prompt: Thunder Hammer slam SFX, heavy mythic impact, thunder crack, sacred shockwave, powerful but clean gameplay one shot.
sfx.envelope: heavy transient, thunder crack, low heroic tail

theme: Light Warrior: brave warmth and sacred restoration pushing back readable shadow corruption
